html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.Pneumococcal contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Draft Medication Request ID for Pneumococcal dose
Pneumococcal vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note
Pneumococcal vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note Guidance
Pneumococcal vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note.
Pneumococcal vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note. Guidance
